title: The Life of Jimmy Dolan
writer: Bertram Millhauser, Beulah Marie Dix, David Boehm
actors: Douglas Fairbanks Jr., Loretta Young, Aline MacMahon
plot: Prizefighter Jimmy Dolan accidentally kills a man at a party and escapes. He hides out at a health farm for invalid children and begins to lose his cynicism under the influence of the children and of Peggy and Mrs. Moore, who run ...
